TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sweden, title = Sweden, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sweden} }

S.FORM: Sweden hya' ga cyux maki' tay 62 00 N, 15 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 450,295 sq km (maki' tay 56ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 410,335 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 39,960 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,880,604. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 7.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 68.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 23.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Stockholm. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 6 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Sweden hya' ga cyux maki' tay 62 00 N, 15 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 450,295 sq km (maki' tay 56ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 410,335 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 39,960 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,880,604. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 7.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 68.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 23.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Stockholm. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 6 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēwe*en ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a *.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēto ¶~ ®kńßolm. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mtzju Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ēta*, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
